title: Something New
author: Ohio State Board of Commerce
description: Something Fresh is a novel by P. G. Wodehouse, first published as Something New in the United States, by D. Appleton & Company on 3 September 1915. It was published in the United Kingdom as Something Fresh by Methuen & Co. on 16 September 1915. There are a number of differences between the American and British versions, but essentially, it is the same book.
